responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix IVX app startup reliability (black screen, infinite loading, crash) and fix automatic owner sign-in on cold launch so the login screen appears every time, then build and ship APKs proving both fixes

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved — no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project, no replacement shell
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app` (NOT `com.rork.ivxholdings` — that Kotlin app is frozen)
- Use `bun x` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Never ask user for credentials — find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports — redact all tokens/keys
- Owner email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID are NOT set in sandbox — EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Diagnostic banner must be hidden by default in ALL runtimes, available only through Owner Control → Diagnostics
- Owner AI send button must be disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER` auth state
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture — modify the EXISTING codebase only
- User demanded: exact file, line number, function name, root cause, code change, commit SHA, build ID, new APK, Android logcat, screenshot, confirmation app opens in under 5 seconds
- Startup requirements: max 5s startup timeout, visible error screen on init failure, try/catch on every startup task, log failing module, no network blocking during startup, auth must init async without freezing UI

## Progress
### Done
- Build 16 auth context fixes (still present):
  - `initAuth()` calls `supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' })` on cold launch, sets `manualOwnerLoginRef.current = false`
  - `onAuthStateChange` gated by `manualOwnerLoginRef` — ignores all session events unless manual login occurred
  - `manualOwnerLoginRef` set unconditionally in `login()`, `loginOwnerPasswordless()`, `verify2FA()`
- Build 17 router auth guard added to `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`:
  - `useEffect` redirects to `/login` when `!isAuthenticated && !isLoading && !isOpenAccessModeEnabled()`
  - Loading spinner while `isLoading` is true
  - `redirectAttemptedRef` prevents duplicate redirects, resets when authenticated
- Build 17 APK built, verified, uploaded to gofile.io: `https://gofile.io/d/V1vw3Y` (litterbox was down with 500 errors)
- Build 18 startup reliability fixes applied to 3 files:
  - **`expo/app/_layout.tsx`**: Added `expo-splash-screen` import, `SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync()` at module scope, `SplashScreen.hideAsync()` in `useEffect`, 5-second `STARTUP_TIMEOUT_MS` safety timer showing visible error screen with Retry button, `injectWebKeyboardCSS()` wrapped in try/catch, startup error state with fallback UI, all deferred module loading wrapped in try/catch
  - **`expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`**: `initAuth()` now wraps `supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' })` in `withTimeout()` using existing `AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS` (3500ms) — prevents hung AsyncStorage operations from leaving `isLoading` true forever. `finally` block always sets `isLoading` to false
  - **`expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`**: Added 5-second `loadingTimedOut` state — if `isLoading` stays true for >5s, forces `effectiveLoading` to false so auth guard proceeds. Added "Loading IVX…" text below spinner. Uses `effectiveLoading = isLoading && !loadingTimedOut` pattern
- `app.config.ts` bumped to versionCode 18, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_18_STARTUP_FIX`, buildTimestamp `2026-07-15T06:30:00.000000+00:00`
- TypeScript passes clean (0 errors) after all build 18 changes
- Build 18 APK built successfully:
  - `expo prebuild --clean --platform android` completed
  - `gradlew :app:assembleRelease` — BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 4s, 397 tasks
  - package `com.ivxholdings.app`, versionCode 18, versionName 1.4.3, 84MB (87,529,124 bytes)
  - Bundle verification: `preventAutoHideAsync` (2 matches), `hideAsync` (2 matches), "taking longer than expected" (1), "failed to start" (1), "Startup timeout reached" (1), "Cold-launch signOut" (1), "TabsLayout" (1) — all confirmed in `index.android.bundle`
  - Copied to `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build18.apk`
- Build 18 APK uploaded to gofile.io: `https://gofile.io/d/bjK29i`
- Watchman disabled (`chmod -x /usr/local/bin/watchman`) — Metro uses polling fallback

### In Progress
- `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` needs update with build 18 details (was read but not yet rewritten)
- `.rork/plans/build-one-unified-ivx-holdings-android-a_1784077962623.plan.md` needs update for build 18

### Blocked
- EXPO_TOKEN not set — EAS cloud build unavailable
- EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID not set — defaults to placeholder
- GitHub token expired (HTTP 401) — cannot push to GitHub repo, Render backend stuck at `0b37191f`
- Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox — user must test installed APK on physical device
- Android logcat and screenshot of first screen require a physical device or emulator — not available in sandbox

## Key Decisions
- **Build 18 root cause #1 (black screen)**: `expo-splash-screen` was installed (`~31.0.13`) but NEVER imported or called. Android dismisses native splash before JS bundle loads → black screen. Fixed with `preventAutoHideAsync()` + `hideAsync()`.
- **Build 18 root cause #2 (infinite loading)**: `initAuth()` had no timeout. `supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' })` does async AsyncStorage ops — if slow on Android, `isLoading` stays true forever. Constant `AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS = 3500` existed at line 39 but was never used. Fixed by wrapping signOut in `withTimeout()`.
- **Build 18 root cause #3 (no safety net)**: TabsLayout loading spinner had no timeout — showed indefinitely if `isLoading` never resolved. Fixed with 5-second `loadingTimedOut` state that forces auth guard to proceed.
- **Build 17 root cause (router)**: `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` had NO auth guard — app opened to home without checking `isAuthenticated`. Fixed with `useEffect` redirect to `/login`.
- Open access mode (`isOpenAccessModeEnabled()`) bypasses the auth guard — only true in development builds
- `redirectAttemptedRef` prevents duplicate redirects and resets when user becomes authenticated
- Cold launch signs out persisted Supabase session — owner MUST enter credentials every time
- `manualOwnerLoginRef` gates `onAuthStateChange` — ignores all session events unless set true by manual login
- Building APK locally via `expo prebuild` + `gradlew assembleRelease` since EAS cloud is blocked
- gofile.io used as upload service — litterbox.catbox.moe had sustained 500 outage

## Next Steps
1. Update `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` with build 18 details and gofile.io download URL
2. Update plan file `.rork/plans/build-one-unified-ivx-holdings-android-a_1784077962623.plan.md` for build 18
3. User must test build 18 on real device: fresh install, cold launch, force stop+reopen, offline startup, slow network, logout+reopen — verify no black screen, no infinite spinner, no crash, app opens in <5s, owner login screen appears after cold launch

## Critical Context
- Git HEAD SHA: `e3149d5c995d8e3d95a205d9d4ce4ae65a0958f3` (`e3149d5`)
- Build 18 APK at `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build18.apk` (84MB, versionCode 18) — uploaded to `https://gofile.io/d/bjK29i`
- Build 17 APK at `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build17.apk` — uploaded to `https://gofile.io/d/V1vw3Y`
- Build 16 APK at `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build16.apk` and `https://litter.catbox.moe/ti5mjx.apk` (likely expired)
- `aapt2` at `/home/user/.gradle/caches/8.14.1/transforms/.../aapt2` for APK verification
- Supabase production URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (project ref `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb`)
- Supabase client `lib/supabase.ts` uses Proxy pattern for live client delegation, `persistSession: true` with AsyncStorage adapter
- `AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS = 3500` defined at line 39 of `auth-context.tsx` — now actually used in `initAuth()` via `withTimeout()`
- `withTimeout` utility at line 433 of `auth-context.tsx` — resolves with `fallbackValue` after timeout
- `expo-splash-screen` version `~31.0.13` in package.json
- No font loading calls anywhere in the app (`useFonts`, `Font.loadAsync` not used)
- Metro bundler works with Watchman disabled — uses polling fallback
- Gradle 8.14.3, JDK 17.0.13, Kotlin 2.1.20, Android SDK 35/36 build-tools available

## Relevant Files
- `expo/app/_layout.tsx`: Root layout — **BUILD 18**: added SplashScreen control, 5s startup timeout with visible error screen, try/catch on all startup tasks. Providers: I18n → Auth → Analytics → IPX → Email, each wrapped in `ProviderBoundary`
- `expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`: Tabs layout — **BUILD 17+18**: auth guard redirects to `/login` when unauthenticated, 5s loading safety timeout with `effectiveLoading`, "Loading IVX…" text
- `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: Core auth context — **BUILD 16+18**: `initAuth()` signs out on cold launch wrapped in `withTimeout(AUTH_BOOTSTRAP_TIMEOUT_MS)`, `onAuthStateChange` gated by `manualOwnerLoginRef`, `isLoading` initial state `true`
- `expo/app.config.ts`: Expo config — versionCode 18, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_18_STARTUP_FIX`, sourceCommitSha `e3149d5...`
- `expo/lib/supabase.ts`: Supabase singleton — Proxy-based live client, `persistSession: true`, AsyncStorage adapter, `autoRefreshToken: true`, `flowType: 'pkce'`
- `expo/lib/open-access.ts`: `isOpenAccessModeEnabled()` — false in production
- `expo/shared/ivx/access-control.ts`: `getIVXAccessControlConfig()` — `openAccessEnabled` false in production
- `expo/app/login.tsx`: Login screen — redirects to `/(tabs)/(home)/home` when `isAuthenticated` (line 553-574), open-access bypass (line 536-547)
- `expo/components/DiagnosticErrorBoundary.tsx`: Shows full crash error + stack trace on screen
- `expo/app/(tabs)/(home)/_layout.tsx`: Home segment Stack layout — no auth check (relies on parent tabs guard)
- `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json`: Currently has build 17 details — needs update for build 18
- `.rork/plans/build-one-unified-ivx-holdings-android-a_1784077962623.plan.md`: Project plan tracking all tasks
